name: control mapping validator rejects a satisfied_by value outside the rubric_rule hook artifact enum per section 2.9
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-control-mapping.sh" --controls controls.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'satisfied_by' err.txt && grep -q 'external_audit' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
setup:
printf '%b
' '- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [external_audit]
  legal_review_status: not-applicable' > controls.yaml
